nodes.label: Sales Commission v1 (flat 8%)
nodes.rationale: Original scheme: base ฿15,000-25,000, flat 8% on all packages incl. Spark/Shop, monthly bonus ฿3K/8K/15K at ฿100K/300K/500K (non-cumulative), recurring 4% within 6 months then organic, 7-day refund window, minimum quota ฿30K from month 4. Superseded by v2.1 (higher bases, accelerator brackets, self-serve carve-out, 30-day clawback, recurring 3% for customer lifetime).

edges.source_location: Commission table over the 8 paid package tiers
index.html section 7 embeds the identical v1 salary/commission/bonus tables and scenarios
